items.name: Hardy Bearing 3
items.effect: ×400 ×1000 ×100 Disables unit's and foe's skills that change attack priority.

items.name: Heavy Blade 3
items.effect: ×400 ×1000 ×100 If unit's Atk ≥ foe's Atk, grants Special cooldown charge +1 per unit's attack. (Only highest value applied. Does not stack.)

items.name: Hone Atk 3
items.effect: ×400 ×1000 ×100 At start of turn, grants Atk+4 to adjacent allies for 1 turn.

items.name: Hone Beasts
items.effect: Can be obtained through Tempest Trials and enhanced through Sacred Seal Enhancement At start of turn, grants Atk/Spd+6 to adjacent beast allies for 1 turn.

items.name: Hone Dragons
items.effect: Can be obtained through Tempest Trials and enhanced through Sacred Seal Enhancement At start of turn, grants Atk/Spd+6 to adjacent dragon allies for 1 turn.

items.name: Hone Spd 3
items.effect: ×400 ×1000 ×100 At start of turn, grants Spd+4 to adjacent allies for 1 turn.

items.name: HP/Atk 2
items.effect: Can be obtained through Tempest Trials and enhanced through Sacred Seal Enhancement ×400 ×1000 ×100 Grants HP +4, Atk +2.

items.name: HP/Def 2

items.name: HP/Spd 2

items.name: Inf. Hexblade 3
items.effect: Currently cannot be created in the Sacred Seal Forge ×400 ×1000 ×100 If adjacent infantry allies use sword, lance, axe, bow, or dagger, grants Atk/Spd+2 to those allies and calculates their damage using the lower of foe's Def or Res during combat. (Does not affect damage dealt by Specials that trigger before combat.)

items.name: Inf. Null Follow 3
items.effect: Currently cannot be created in the Sacred Seal Forge ×400 ×1000 ×100 At start of turn, grants 【Null Follow-Up】 to infantry allies within 2 spaces of unit.

items.name: Infantry Rush 3
items.effect: Can be obtained through Tempest Trials and enhanced through Sacred Seal Enhancement ×400 ×1000 ×100 Infantry allies within 2 spaces gain: "If unit’s Atk ≥ foe’s Atk +1, grants Special cooldown charge +1 per attack. (Only highest value applied. Does not stack.)"

items.name: Iote's Shield
items.effect: Available through Sacred Seal Creation ×20 ×100 ×20 Neutralizes "effective against flying" bonuses.

items.name: Kestrel Stance 2
items.effect: Can be obtained through Tempest Trials and enhanced through Sacred Seal Enhancement If foe initiates combat, grants Atk/Spd +4 during combat.

items.name: Life and Death 3
items.effect: Can be obtained through Tempest Trials and enhanced through Sacred Seal Enhancement ×400 ×1000 ×100 Grants Atk/Spd +5. Inflicts Def/Res -5.

items.name: Live to Serve 3
items.effect: ×400 ×1000 ×100 When healing an ally with a staff, restores HP to unit = HP restored to target.

items.name: Mirror Stance 2
items.effect: Can be obtained through Tempest Trials and enhanced through Sacred Seal Enhancement ×400 ×1000 ×100 If foe initiates combat, grants Atk/Res +4 during combat.

items.name: Mirror Strike 2
items.effect: Can be obtained through Tempest Trials and enhanced through Sacred Seal Enhancement ×400 ×1000 ×100 Grants Atk/Res +4 during combat if unit initiates combat.

items.name: Mystic Boost 3
items.effect: Can be obtained through Tempest Trials and enhanced through Sacred Seal Enhancement ×400 ×1000 ×100 Disables foe’s skills that "calculate damage using the lower of foe’s Def or Res" and "calculate damage from staff like other weapons." Restores 6 HP after combat.

items.name: Null Follow-Up 3
items.effect: Currently cannot be created in the Sacred Seal Forge ×400 ×1000 ×100 Disables foe’s skills that guarantee foe’s follow-up attack and foe’s skills that prevent unit’s follow-up attack.

items.name: Obstruct 3
items.effect: ×400 ×1000 ×100 If unit's HP ≥ 50%, foes cannot move through spaces adjacent to unit. (Does not affect foes with Pass skills.)

items.name: Odd Atk Wave 3
items.effect: Currently cannot be created in the Sacred Seal Forge ×400 ×1000 ×100 At start of odd-numbered turns, grants Atk +6 to unit and adjacent allies for 1 turn. (Bonus granted to unit even if no allies are adjacent. )

items.name: Odd Def Wave 3
items.effect: Can be obtained through Tempest Trials and enhanced through Sacred Seal Enhancement ×400 ×1000 ×100 At start of odd-numbered turns, grants Def +6 to unit and adjacent allies for 1 turn. (Bonus granted to unit even if no allies are adjacent. )

items.name: Odd Res Wave 3
items.effect: Currently cannot be created in the Sacred Seal Forge ×400 ×1000 ×100 At start of odd-numbered turns, grants Res +6 to unit and adjacent allies for 1 turn. (Bonus granted to unit even if no allies are adjacent. )

items.name: Odd Spd Wave 3
items.effect: Currently cannot be created in the Sacred Seal Forge ×400 ×1000 ×100 At start of odd-numbered turns, grants Spd +6 to unit and adjacent allies for 1 turn. (Bonus granted to unit even if no allies are adjacent. )

items.name: Odd Tempest 3
items.effect: Currently cannot be created in the Sacred Seal Forge ×400 ×1000 ×100 At start of odd-numbered turns, unit can move 1 extra space. (That turn only. Does not stack.)

items.name: Panic Ploy 3
items.effect: ×400 ×1000 ×100 At start of turn, converts bonuses on foes in cardinal directions with HP ≤ unit's HP into penalties through their next actions.

items.name: Pegasus Flight 3
items.effect: Currently cannot be created in the Sacred Seal Forge ×400 ×1000 ×100 At start of combat, if unit's Spd ≥ foe's Spd-7, inflicts penalty on foes Atk/Def during combat = 50% of difference between Res stats (unit’s Res minus foe’s Res) before combat. (Maximum penalty of -7).

items.name: Phantom Res 3
items.effect: Can be obtained through Tempest Trials and enhanced through Sacred Seal Enhancement ×400 ×1000 ×100 If a skill compares unit's Res to a foe's or ally's Res, treats unit's Res as if granted +10.

items.name: Phantom Spd 3
items.effect: ×400 ×1000 ×100 If a skill compares unit's Spd to a foe's or ally's Spd, treats unit's Spd as if granted +10.

items.name: Poison Strike 3
items.effect: ×400 ×1000 ×100 If unit initiates combat, deals 10 damage to foe after combat.

items.name: Quick Riposte 3
items.effect: ×400 ×1000 ×100 If unit's HP ≥ 70% and foe initiates combat, unit makes a guaranteed follow-up attack.

items.name: Quickened Pulse
items.effect: ×20 ×100 ×20 At the start of turn 1, grants Special cooldown count-1.

items.name: Renewal 3
items.effect: Can be obtained through Tempest Trials and enhanced through Sacred Seal Enhancement ×400 ×1000 ×100 At the start of every second turn, restores 10 HP.

items.name: Res Feint 3
items.effect: Can be obtained through Tempest Trials and enhanced through Sacred Seal Enhancement ×400 ×1000 ×100 If a Rally Assist skill is used by unit or targets unit, inflicts Res-7 on foes in cardinal directions of unit through their next actions.

items.name: Res Opening 3
items.effect: Can be obtained through Tempest Trials and enhanced through Sacred Seal Enhancement ×400 ×1000 ×100 At start of turn, grants Res+6 to ally with the highest Res for 1 turn. (Excludes unit.)

items.name: Res Ploy 3
items.effect: ×400 ×1000 ×100 At start of turn, inflicts Res-5 on foes in cardinal directions with Res < unit's Res through their next actions.

items.name: Res Tactic 3
items.effect: ×400 ×1000 ×100 At start of turn, grants Res +6 to allies within 2 spaces for 1 turn. Granted only if the number of that ally’s movement type on current team ≤ 2.

items.name: Shield Session 3

items.effect: ×400 ×1000 ×100 Grants Spd/Def +2

items.effect: Currently cannot be created in the Sacred Seal Forge ×400 ×1000 ×100 At start of combat, if foe’s HP = 100% or if 【Penalty】 is active on foe, grants Spd/Def+5 to unit during combat.【Penalty】All effects that last "on foe through its next action." Includes penalties inflicted by a skill like Panic or Threaten and negative status effects (preventing counterattacks, restricting movement, or the effects of a skill like Triangle Adept or Guard).

items.name: Spd/Def Clash 3
items.effect: Currently cannot be created in the Sacred Seal Forge ×400 ×1000 ×100 If unit or foe initiates combat after moving to a different space, grants bonus to unit's Spd/Def during combat = X + 5. (X = number of spaces moved by whoever initiated combat; max 3.)

(Except when dealing damage with area-of-effect Specials.)
